name: Delete a book from search bar in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Delete a book from search bar in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter book 'Silk Road' and save it as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Clear search field on catalog books screen
Then  Search field is empty on catalog books screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Delete a book from search bar in LYRASIS

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Delete a book from search bar in LYRASIS
